name: To the Wild Country
overview: Naturalists John and Janet Foster lead a series of expeditions into the remotest regions of Canada, revealing the spectacular features and wildlife of its vast system of National Parks. From Pacific Rim National Park to Gros Morne National Park, they travel from one end to the other of the world’s second largest country.

trailers.title: TO THE WILD COUNTRY (1972) | Official Trailer #3 | HD
